description: Cross-language REFRESH-PATH conformance (bead ess-14f.12 / RS-R4, parent ess-14f; CONFORMANCE_SPEC.md §5.10): the discrete-cadence loader + dependent-var refresh consumer must, across bindings, (1) regrid the offline loader native fields onto the simulation grid to the same arrays and (2) integrate the resulting forced model to the same trajectory, on shared OFFLINE fixtures (no network). The forcing is piecewise-constant across the cadence segments, so the golden is analytic and exact. This complements §5.7 (cadence PARTITION — which class each node is) and §5.8 (regrid KERNEL geometry); §5.10 pins the composition: refresh-at-cadence -> regrid -> write-buffer -> integrate.

scope_excluded.go: rewrite-only port; no array simulator / refresh executor
scope_excluded.typescript: rewrite-only port; no array simulator / refresh executor
